subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that I have desired to make mention of one among Thy servants, purely for Thy sake, that he may be drawn by the breezes [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تعلم بانی اردت ان اذکر عبدا من عبادک خالصا لوجهک لتجذبه نفحات
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @suffering and imprisonment
